title: Email with item mail address
excerpt: I want to send an email from Emails and Activities but receive only emails that came from the current item (and not from other items that contain the same email address) how do I do that? Is there a way to send the email…

posts.author: ItamarS (itamar strum)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to send an email from Emails and Activities but receive only emails that came from the current item (and not from other items that contain the same email address) how do I do that? Is there a way to send the email along with the item address?
